title: Endpoint Privilege Management - Display - Reduce Service Desk Tickets

fields.headingSection: Reduce Service Desk Tickets and Empower End Users
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: Deflect service desk tickets by empowering users to install and run their own pre-approved applications. Watch a demo to see how BeyondTrust makes it possible.

fields.headingSection: Proactively Support Users with Endpoint Privilege Management

fields.heading: Dramatically Reduce Ticket Volumes and Slash Service Desk Costs
fields.body:
Most companies have removed administrator rights from users, which creates headaches for the service desk. Users must contact the service desk to perform basic tasks that require admin rights, such as installing a local printer.

BeyondTrust Privilege Management for Windows and Mac gives your users enough access to remain productive in their roles, without giving them full admin rights. Access is given on an application basis, rather than on a user basis. Not only does this benefit users, but removing admin rights can save the service desk up to $65 per ticket according to HDI, or up to $2400/user each year, according to Gartner.

fields.heading: Improve Customer Satisfaction
fields.body: Keep your users productive (and happy) without giving them admin rights

fields.heading: Deflect Service Desk Calls
fields.body: Automatically elevate a user’s privileges to trusted apps to reduce tickets and costs

fields.heading: Protect Sensitive Data
fields.body: Enable the level of access end users need while preventing malware and ransomware

fields.headingSection: Achieve True Least Privilege on Day 1 with Quick Start Policies

fields.body:
Removing admin rights doesn't have to be hard. And you don't need weeks or months to implement it. BeyondTrust Quick Start Policies are flexible, out-of-the-box workstyles that let you immediately eliminate admin rights for everyone on day 1 without disrupting the business. BeyondTrust protects your estate right away, allowing you to analyze behavior and refine policies as you go.

Our built-in policies are based on experience thousands of deployments across even the most complex organizations. This rapid on-boarding process means you can remove overnight without productivity loss.

Templates work for all users, from the least privileged desktop user to advanced developers and sysadmins.

fields.headingSection: Stop Zero Day Threats and Fileless Ransomware Attacks

fields.body:
Many cyber attacks target trusted applications. Trusted applications remain a threat even if you've removed admin rights. Attackers can use script-based malware in Office documents and PowerShell to conduct file-less attacks and evade detection.

The pre-built templates within Trusted Applications Protection stop attacks involving trusted apps, catching bad scripts and infected email attachments immediately.

Use it to protect trusted applications such as Word, PowerPoint, Excel, Adobe Reader, common web browsers, and more by controlling their child processes and DLLs.

fields.headingSection: Identify & Stop Attacks Targeting Hidden Privileges
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
Today’s complex and dynamic IT landscape creates a complicated threat landscape, with hidden “true” privileges and paths to privileges that attackers can exploit. The question isn’t if attackers will find these vulnerabilities but rather when.

By combining the foundational strengths of Password Safe with the advanced AI/ML-powered capabilities of Identity Security Insights, you can not only quickly assess your identity security posture, but you can also proactively close your gaps, detect privilege abuse, and fortify your identity landscape against modern threats.

Get started to experience the full breadth of detections and easy-to-understand guidance available with Identity Security Insights.

fields.headingSection: Use Identity Security Insights to Detect...

fields.heading: Identity & Account Misconfigurations
fields.body:
Auto-detect risky identity and account configurations, and apply the tool's clear recommendations to proactively harden your identity security posture.

Identity and account detections include:

  • Unmanaged privileged accounts
  • Privileged accounts that lack MFA
  • Non-privileged accounts with attack paths to Domain Admin for on-premises AD
  • Non-privileged accounts that can retrieve password hashes from AD Domain Controller via a DCSync attack
  • Accounts vulnerable to Kerberoasting
  • Accounts with personal email addresses
  • And more

fields.heading: Threats & Anomalous Activities
fields.body:
Benefit from continuous monitoring of your identity infrastructure, and alerts to the in-progress attacks and suspicious activities that you want to know about.

This includes:

  • Malicious IP Sign-In
  • Excessive secret safe read events
  • Password sprays
  • Excessive API Registration read events
  • Excessive managed account password read events
  • Dormant accounts that suddenly try to leverage privileged access
  • And more

fields.heading: Whole-of-State Cybersecurity
fields.subheading: Comprehensive security for state and local government

fields.headingSection: Key Challenges
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: Municipal governments and smaller organizations are increasingly targeted by threat actors, and yet are often under-resourced to adequately defend themselves.

fields.heading45: Common Public Sector Security Issues Include:

fields.heading: Increasing Cyber Threats
fields.body: Ransomware and other sophisticated attacks are increasingly targeting state entities as well as underfunded local entities, putting sensitive data and critical services at risk.

fields.heading: Resource Constraints
fields.body: Local governments especially struggle with limited budgets and a shortage of cybersecurity expertise, making it difficult to implement robust security measures

fields.heading: Lack of Collaboration
fields.body: Many public sector organizations struggle to collaborate on security initiatives, as they lack a unified strategy and the ability to share valuable security information between siloed local teams.

fields.headingSection: The Solution: A Holistic Security Approach
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: A Whole-of-State approach provides consistent and effective protection against cyber threats across an entire state. This approach emphasizes partnerships, collaboration, and information sharing between agencies at all levels of government, with the primary goal of establishing a unified cybersecurity strategy that addresses risks across the state and its various departments and agencies.

fields.headingSection: Why Choose a Whole-of-State Approach?
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
• United Defense: Present a strong, coordinated front against cyber threats
  • Resource Optimization: Share expertise and tools across agencies
  • Improved Compliance: Streamline adherence to regulatory standards
  • Enhanced Incident Response: Coordinate rapid responses to cyber incidents

fields.heading: Reduce Identity-Based Attacks
fields.body: Apply least privilege and zero trust principles with BeyondTrust’s innovative approach to identity security which reduces the attack surface and blast radius of identity-based attacks leveraging elevated privileges.

fields.heading: Achieve Unmatched Visibility
fields.body: BeyondTrust provides the industry’s deepest knowledge and context of all identities, providing complete visibility into paths to privilege, reducing risk exposure, and empowering intelligent actions to mitigate risk.

fields.heading: Simplify Compliance Initiatives
fields.body: Whether you’re subject to PCI, HIPAA, ISO, GDPR, SOC2, or other regulations, BeyondTrust’s solutions automatically capture a detailed audit trail that documents all session activity and credential usage.

fields.headingSection: The BeyondTrust Platform

fields.heading: Gain Holistic Visibility into Identities and Paths to Privilege
fields.body:
Identity Security Insights is an analytics solution that detects anomalous activity and threats resulting from compromised identities and privileged access misuse. The solution correlates data across BeyondTrust products and third-party solutions, providing a single view of human and non-human identities, accounts, and privileged access.

Identity Security Insights illuminates risk ratings, entitlement details, and other key info that can be leveraged to respond to potential misuse events. Also benefit from proactive recommendations you can act on to reduce risk and improving your security posture.

fields.heading: Prevent Account Hijacking & Other Threats
fields.body:
Password Safe combines privileged password and session management to discover, manage, and audit all privileged credential activity. Scan, identify, and profile all assets for automated onboarding, ensuring no credentials are left unmanaged.

Control privileged user accounts, applications, SSH keys, DevOps secrets, cloud admin accounts, RPA accounts, and more. Also vault and generate employee passwords used for enterprise applications.

Utilize adaptive access control for automated evaluation of just-in-time context for authorization access requests. Monitor and record live sessions in real time and pause or terminate suspicious sessions. Enable a searchable audit trail for compliance and forensics.

fields.heading: Ensure Identity-Secure Access with a VPN-less Solution
fields.body:
Privileged Remote Access empowers IT teams to control, manage, and audit remote privileged access by authorized employees, contractors, and vendors—without compromising on security. Securely connect from anywhere, to anywhere – no VPN required.

Extend privileged access to cloud assets and limit network traffic and ports to only authorized sources and applications. Monitor sessions and confidently meet compliance requirements with an unimpeachable audit trail.

Consistently enforce least privilege and exert granular control and visibility over remote access, while enabling user productivity.

fields.heading: Enable Hassle-Free JIT Access to Cloud Permissions
fields.body:
Entitle automates cloud permissions management, enabling organizations to implement seamless just-in-time access to reduce the attack surface and IT workloads. Self-service requests, capabilities such as permission bundling, and 100+ integrations, eliminate the need to manually manage thousands of cloud permissions.

The result? Secure, hassle-free access that empowers the workforce to efficiently do their jobs.

fields.heading: Enforce Least Privilege and Control Applications
fields.body:
Endpoint Privilege Management pairs powerful least privilege management and application control capabilities, delivering fast, unmatched preventative endpoint security. Benefit from industry-best privileged access management controls across all endpoints—Windows, macOS, Linux—to condense the attack surface and enhance administration

Grant the right privilege to the right application – not user – only when needed, and create a single audit trail. Prebuilt policy templates for Windows and macOS stop attacks involving trusted apps, instantly addressing bad scripts and infected email attachments. Application control, allow-lists, and exception handling enable granular control over what users can install or run, and what applications can execute.

Extend capabilities far beyond sudo on Linux, with centralized administration, session monitoring and management, file integrity monitoring, and powerful productivity enhancement.

fields.heading: Securely Access and Support Any Device or System, Anywhere
fields.body:
Remote Support enables help desk teams to quickly and securely access and fix any remote device, on any platform, with a single solution. BeyondTrust enables the greatest number of attended and unattended remote support use cases, has the most robust built-in security features, and unlocks powerful synergies via key service desk integrations.

Gain absolute visibility and control over internal and external remote access, secure connectivity to managed assets, and create a complete, unimpeachable audit trail for compliance.

Organizations of all sizes can boost service desk productivity, efficiency, and security by consolidating and standardizing help desk support with BeyondTrust.

fields.heading: Centralize and Streamline Authentication Across Windows, Unix, and Linux
fields.body:
Active Directory Bridge centralizes authentication for Unix and Linux environments by extending Microsoft AD’s Kerberos authentication and single sign-on. Users leverage their AD credentials to access Unix and Linux systems for a seamless experience.

Organizations can attain consistency by extending native group policy management tools to include settings for Unix and Linux and transition users from desktops to remote machines or between systems, without requiring credential reentry. Leveraging Microsoft Group Policy across non-Windows platforms also enables centralized configuration management, reducing the risk and complexity of managing a heterogeneous environment.

fields.headingSection: Least Privilege Across Your Stack, from One Cohesive Platform
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: BeyondTrust’s Least Privilege Defense-in-Depth solution, delivered via our integrated Pathfinder Platform, empowers organizations with the streamlined least privilege approach they need across their entire workforce and IT ecosystem.

fields.heading: Least Privilege Across Endpoints and Applications
fields.body:
Without the right endpoint least privilege solution, organizations either over-permission users—expanding the attack surface—or lock down access so tightly that productivity suffers.

BeyondTrust removes endpoint admin rights and enforces least privilege across your estate (Windows, macOS, Unix, Linux, etc.), without hurting productivity. Our endpoint privilege management capabilities pair with pragmatic application control to condense the attack surface, while intelligently elevating just enough access to what is needed, only when needed.

fields.heading: Least Privilege Across Identities and Accounts
fields.body:
The number and diversity of accounts (human / machine) and credentials has exploded. Yet, organizations typically manage their credential and account estate with a patchwork of tools that don't even provide full coverage. This creates fertile ground for attackers.

BeyondTrust streamlines your approach to managing and enforcing best practices for all types of privileged credentials, secrets, keys, etc. Eliminate hardcoded credentials, shared accounts, reused passwords, and other risky practices. Adaptive access controls and session management further ensure identities are robustly protected and audited.

fields.heading: Least Privilege Across Every Session
fields.body:
Enterprise access pathways are proliferating. Many present hidden and dangerous privilege escalation pathways. For instance, remote and vendor access can introduce security blind spots, especially when VPNs, RDP, and other legacy tools expose broad access. Attackers target risky sessions to hijack access and launch further attacks.

BeyondTrust's Least Privilege solution implements zero trust network access (ZTNA) and granularly controls sessions. whether for humans, non-human identities, employees, or third-parties. Best-in-class PAM controls extend to every session, no matter where it originates or goes. Our solution also implements segmentation, microsegmentation, and privilege separation to ensure critical access is isolated and the blast radius of attacks is limited.

fields.heading: Least Privilege Across the Cloud
fields.body:
Managing user entitlements—whether in cloud environments, SaaS apps, or hybrid IT infrastructures—is one of the most dangerously under-addressed security risks today. Excessive permissions, misconfigured roles, and unchecked privilege creep are rampant.

BeyondTrust right-sizes access across your multicloud estate. Seamlessly operationalize modern JIT access that supports self-service requests, permission bundling, and more to ensure users get the hassle-free access they need, but only for the finite moments required.

By eliminating standing (24/7) entitlements and continuously adjusting access based on policy and context, you can reduce security gaps, while enhancing operational efficiency.

fields.headingSection: BeyondTrust Discovers Okta Breach with Identity Security Insights
fields.body250: October 2, 2023: Identity Security Insights detected an identity-centric attack on an in-house Okta administrator account.  BeyondTrust immediately blocked the attack and reported breach to Okta, weeks before  Okta publicly acknowledged their breach.

fields.heading: What was the timeline of the attack?
fields.body:
• October 2, 2023 – Detected and remediated identity centric attack on an in-house Okta administrator account and alerted Okta
  • October 3, 2023 – Asked Okta support to escalate to Okta security team given initial forensics pointing to a compromise within Okta support organization
  • October 11, 2023 and October 13, 2023 – Held Zoom sessions with Okta security team to explain why we believed they might be compromised
  • October 19, 2023 – Okta security leadership confirmed they had an internal breach.

fields.heading: How did BeyondTrust defend against the attack?
fields.body: The Okta administrator’s account was protected with FIDO2 authentication, and policies within BeyondTrust’s Okta only allowed access to the admin console from managed devices with Okta Verify installed. Our own instance of BeyondTrust’s Identity Security Insights, and tailored detections from our security teams, alerted us to several aspects of the intrusion. We immediately disabled the backdoor user account and revoked the attacker’s access before the account could be used and preventing any further actions.

fields.heading: What did Identity Security Insights detect and alert on during the attack?
fields.body:
• Okta session hijacking
  • Okta user performed administrative action using a proxy
  • Okta admin privileges were granted to a user
  • Okta password health report generated
  • Okta user with some level of admin access uses MFA vulnerable to SIM swapping

fields.headingSection: Why Choose BeyondTrust Versus RDP and Alternative Remote Desktop Tools?
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
When it comes to empowering your service desk, nothing beats BeyondTrust Remote Support. BeyondTrust's best-in-class solution simplifies remote desktop support and management. Our secure remote desktop access solution enables IT admins to resolve issues more quickly and more securely than alternatives, improving productivity and end-user satisfaction. And, Remote Support integrates with your ITSM, help desk, and ticketing solutions.

End users can initiate support requests from your support portal, Windows applications, or BeyondTrust Buttons. You can also take remote control of desktops to start support. Plus, our patented Jump Technology is state-of-the-art for server and IT infrastructure maintenance.

fields.heading: Secure Remote Desktop, without VPNs or RDP Ports
fields.body:
Natively, Microsoft Remote Desktop Protocol lacks centralized management, limited identity management integration, no auditing or reporting, and no collaboration capabilities.

In addition, RDP is designed for remote access on a local area network (LAN). Establishing remote desktop connections to computers on remote networks usually requires VPN tunneling, port-forwarding, and firewall configurations that compromise security - such as opening the default listening port, TCP 3389.

Fortunately, BeyondTrust lets you eliminate these problems with RDP.

BeyondTrust works over the internet and through firewalls with no pre-installed client on the remote computer. You can either replace instances of RDP with the BeyondTrust remote desktop solution, or route RDP through BeyondTrust to ensure robust security over remote desktop connections, while benefitting from new options for collaboration. Integrating remote desktop brings BeyondTrust’s streamlined connection process to RDP, which makes connecting to Windows systems on remote network both easier and more secure.

fields.headingSection: Secure Remote Desktop & Remote Support FAQs

fields.question: What is a secure remote desktop?
fields.answer: A secure remote desktop allows users to connect to systems from anywhere, while enforcing strong authentication, least privilege, and session monitoring. It reduces risks linked to open RDP ports and unmanaged remote tools.

fields.question: How do I secure my remote desktop connection?
fields.answer: Use strong authentication, enforce least privilege, and avoid open RDP or VPN ports. BeyondTrust adds credential injection, session monitoring, and just-in-time access to protect every connection.

fields.question: Why is RDP not secure?
fields.answer: RDP lacks centralized management, auditing, and identity integration. Attackers often exploit exposed RDP ports. BeyondTrust closes these gaps with auditing, credential vaulting, and VPN-less access.

fields.question: What is the difference between remote desktop and remote support?
fields.answer: Remote desktops allow general access to a system. Remote support adds technician tools, auditing, and secure workflows. BeyondTrust combines both for IT and service desk use cases.

fields.question: Is BeyondTrust a VPN?
fields.answer: No, BeyondTrust is not a VPN. It provides VPN-less remote desktop access, using Privileged Remote Access and Remote Support to connect securely without exposing networks.

fields.question: Why is BeyondTrust more secure than RDP?
fields.answer: Traditional RDP lacks centralized management and exposes open ports that attackers often exploit. A secure remote desktop solution, like BeyondTrust, provides VPN-less access with least privilege, credential vaulting, and full session monitoring.

First issued in 2018 and updated in 2022, the Cybersecurity Code of Practice for Critical Information Infrastructure (CCoP) specifies the minimum cybersecurity standards for operators of Critical Information Infrastructure (CII) in Singapore to implement in their organizations.

Like many similar regulations around the world, much of what is required by the CCoP is based on existing cybersecurity standards, models, and demonstrated best practices, including concepts like zero trust. Privileged Access Management capabilities are frequently relied on by organisations complying with global cybersecurity requirements and regulations.

Explore this paper to examine some of the key aspects of the Cybersecurity Code of Practice for Critical Information Infrastructure and better understand how Singaporean organizations under this regulation can meet requirements using Privileged Access Management (PAM) solutions, including solutions from BeyondTrust.

fields.headingSection: What is Endpoint Privilege Management?
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: Endpoint Privilege Management (EPM) is a solution used to elevate and delegate privileged access for users in adherence to a least privilege access model. Instead of giving administrative rights to employee, third-party, and vendor users whenever privilege is requested, privileges are elevated for applications to execute specific activities, and only within the proper context and for the finite moments needed. This substantially shrinks the attack surface and enables users to work productively— without unduly exposing the organization to risk.

fields.body180: Most modern breaches involve exploitation or misuse of privileged access. Read the Gartner report to learn how Just-in-Time PAM can drastically reduce privileged access risks.

fields.headingSection: What is Just-in-Time PAM?
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: Just-in-time (JIT) privileged access management (PAM) is a strategy that aligns real-time requests for usage of privileged accounts directly with entitlements, workflow, and appropriate access policies. Companies use this strategy to secure privileged accounts from the flaws of continuous, always-on access by enforcing time based restrictions based on behavioral and contextual parameters.

fields.headingSection: How to Reduce Risks with Just-in-Time PAM
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
In the Gartner report, Reduce Risk Through a Just-in-Time Approach to PAM report, analysts reveal the relationship between privileged access and security risks — including the ever-present dangers presented by standing privileges, which are always-on.

Key topics covered in this report include:

  • The role of administrative privileges in security risks, both as a result of mistakes and malicious action.
  • How personal privileged accounts can leave organizations exposed to unnecessary risk
  • Where security, risk, and identity and access management (IAM) leaders should concentrate least privilege efforts

In addition, you'll gain recommendations for how to properly implement the principle of least privilege, and methods to more effectively mitigate the risks posed by standing privileged access with Just-in-Time PAM.

Sign up to gain instant access to the complete report.

You can also contact BeyondTrust at anytime to accelerate your journey to achieving zero standing privileges by enabling a just-in-time access model.

fields.headingSection: About BeyondTrust Appliances

fields.body:
BeyondTrust virtual appliances do not require changes to your firewall because both endpoints and privileged users connect to the appliance through outbound connections. That means that if the remote desktop or server can connect to the internet, your off-network users can connect to it through BeyondTrust without the use of VPN.

Privileged Remote Access also enables remote sessions within a local area network. In most cases, a remote desktop connection can be established without deploying remote agents or configuring remote computers individually.

BeyondTrust enables multiple remote protocols: RDP, SSH, Telnet, and our patented Jump Technology. Both the Access Console for privileged users and the endpoint application run seamlessly across operating systems including Windows, Mac, Linux, Network Devices, Android, and iOS.

This wide compatibility centralizes remote session management. Each remote session produces detailed logs and video recordings. No data passes through a third party, and all session data is guarded by SSL encryption.

title: Insights + Password Safe - Beyond AD

fields.headingSection: Comprehensive Identity Security that goes beyond Active Directory
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
• Gain comprehensive visibility & control over your identity attack surface​
  • Uncover risky accounts with paths to privilege & secure them immediately​
  • Strengthen identity security posture and build resilience against threats ​

fields.headingSection: Battle-tested, Platform-Agnostic Identity Security
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
BeyondTrust Identity Security Insights goes beyond Active Directory, offering a comprehensive view of the entire identity attack surface across multiple platforms, including Entra ID, Okta, PingOne, AWS, and more.

While many competitors focus primarily on AD, BeyondTrust expands coverage to uncover and remediate risky privileges across endpoints, servers, databases, SaaS, and cloud environments. By layering AI-driven detection with BeyondTrust solutions, organizations can proactively address blind spots and manage privilege risks more effectively than with AD-centric approaches alone.

With Identity Security Insights, your identity security posture is stronger and more resilient, no matter where your identities live.

fields.headingSection: Key Outcomes with Identity Security Insights

fields.tabLink: Gain holistic visibility into identity security posture
fields.heading: Map attack paths targeting sensitive data
fields.body: Identity Security Insights continuously assesses your entire environment, uncovering accounts with True Privileges and both direct and hidden paths to privilege requiring control. It also monitors your Password Safe infrastructure, tracking changes and mapping attack paths targeting sensitive secrets and credentials. It helps you prioritize actions based on impact.

fields.heading: Proactively reduce risk with precise recommendations
fields.body: Identify and mitigate risks like dormant service accounts with unrotated credentials, accounts with Domain Access paths, and shadow admins with unauthorized admin-level privileges. Proactively reduce risks with precise recommendations, detections, and integrated PAM via Password Safe.

fields.tabLink: Streamline PAM by eliminating manual data collection and analysis
fields.heading: Manage accounts and eliminate unauthorized access
fields.body: Make informed decisions by considering the effective privileges of human and non-human accounts, the strength of the posture controls, and whether an account is a prime target of attack. Take proactive measures to manage accounts and eliminate unauthorized access, ensuring credential management and JIT controls through Password Safe.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
In their inaugural (2024) Leadership Compass for ITDR, KuppingerCole highlighted how ITDR solutions provide identity defense in depth by detecting, investigating, and responding to identity-based threats across enterprises.

Access the Identity Security Research Kit now to get the KuppingerCole report and learn why BeyondTrust was recognized as an ITDR Leader across all four categories:

  • Market Leader: Showing success in growing customers, deployment sizes, global reach, and more

fields.headingSection: 3. Cloud Infrastructure Entitlement Management (CIEM) Leadership
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
GigaOm's 2026 Radar for Cloud Infrastructure Entitlement Management (CIEM) report recognized BeyondTrust Pathfinder as both a Leader and Outperformer in the Innovation / Platform Play quadrants.

This report evaluated the capabilities of 22 CIEM solutions, including:

  • Key features such as cloud identity threat detection and response, AI-enabled anomaly detection, automated least privilege, just-in-time (JIT) access, lifecycle entitlements governance and compliance, and automated remediation and right-sizing.
  • Emerging features such non-human identity (NHI) management, ITDR integration, zero trust architecture integration, predictive access analytics, self-service access management, serverless container security support, AI runtime policy enforcement, and data privacy and user consent management.
  • Business criteria such as configurability, flexibility, interoperability, manageability, and more.

fields.headingSection: 4. Enterprise Secrets Management
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
In the 2025 report, KuppingerCole recognizes BeyondTrust as an Enterprise Secrets Management Leader across all four categories: Overall, Product, Innovation, and Market.

This research report highlights:

  • Key secrets management market drivers and trends
  • Essential and emerging secrets management capabilities covering humans and machines
  • The 22 secrets management solution vendors evaluated and ranked

Access the full report, included in our Identity Security Research Kit, to learn more.

fields.headingSection: Always Get Better with BeyondTrust
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
Paths to Privilege™ are today's critical risk exposure points, enabling attackers to evade defenses, escalate access, and execute lateral movement. These paths may be hidden, deeply nested, or indirect, and are often missed by traditional security toolsets.

BeyondTrust's unique identity-centric approach not only focuses on securing and controlling all privileged access, but also on identifying and addressing the Paths to Privilege. With BeyondTrust, you can proactively reduce your identity attack surface and neutralize attacks with velocity and precision.

fields.headingSection: Modern PAM + Foundational PAM
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
You need both for a complete approach.

Privileged access remains one of the most critical aspects of securing modern IT. Today, organizations need solutions that not only provide visibility and control over privilege, but also the privilege pathways that may provide a way for an identity (human or machine) to escalate access.

fields.headingSection: The 7 Key Steps for Complete PAM & Beyond
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
The Buyer's Guide for Complete Privileged Access Management (PAM) highlights the seven must-have PAM capabilities necessary to properly secure identities and access across your organization and advance along your PAM journey. When implemented, these capabilities are designed to deliver enhanced control and accountability over the identities, accounts, assets, users, systems, activity, and potential privilege escalation paths across your environment, while eliminating and mitigating many threat vectors.

Download the complete guide to learn how to advance your PAM initiatives, and also, explore specialized PAM use cases, such as DevOps security, OT security, zero trust enablement, deepfake protection, and more.
